---
title: " "
---

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: center;"}

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.align='center', out.width='40%'}
knitr::include_graphics("images/IMG_7220.JPG")
```

## Mele Mafi

:::

::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: left;"}

As a recent Master of Public Health (MPH) graduate, I am passionate about public health and epidemiology. I hope to find more opportunities to work or intern within the the field with specific interest in HIV and health services research. Working as a Research Assistant, Intern, Compliance Specialist, and Manager I have learned various leadership, organizational, and analytic skills. Additional information can be found at my [Linkedin Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mele-mafi-380193195/). 

:::
